DEFENDANT WAS REPRESENTED BY MAN TANG--MANDARIN INTERPRETER. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF TSENG, SHU CHIAO RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT HAI GANG GROUP INC, D.B.A. CA TECHNOLOGY UNIVERSITY TONG, FRANK $3,300.00 PRINCIPAL, $155.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $3,455.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
